seo_title: Proactive Goal-Directed Intelligence via Composable Sandboxed Programs
meta_description: A new AI architecture that enables proactive goal-directed agents, advancing shared tasks without waiting for user prompts.
body_html:
The new AI architecture, Context, enables proactive goal-directed agents that advance shared tasks without waiting for user prompts.

Key Components

  • Write-time context assembly precomputes enriched typed attributes via Groker agents
  • Composable sandboxed wisdom programs form a governed library of LM-generated imperative programs
  • Proactive goal stream state machines drive conversations toward terminal states
  • Context blocks are byte-identical across turns between semantic changes, enabling near-100% KV-cache reuse

Formal Results

  • The Context Stability Theorem: bounding per-turn LM cost as a function of semantic change rate
  • A Program Composition Correctness Theorem
  • A Declarative Wiring Soundness Theorem
  • The Proactive Dominance Theorem, proving proactive agents weakly dominate reactive agents on expected turns-to-terminal-state
  • Coordination Overhead Elimination and Quality Preservation, establishing Pareto improvements in multi-participant goal chats
  • A Cross-Platform Vote Consistency Theorem

Implementation

  • Implemented in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack

Related Research

  • A new method using nucleic acid secondary structure to assess phylogenetic relationships among species, known as molecular morphometrics

Future Work

  • Further research is needed to explore the applications of Context in various domains

Read time: 10 minutes

source.title: Context: Proactive Goal-Directed Intelligence via Composable Sandboxed Programs, Declarative Wiring, and Structured Interaction
source.summary: Researchers have introduced Context, an intelligence layer for the Magarshak Architecture that enables proactive goal-directed agents to advance shared tasks without waiting for user prompts. This architecture relies on three mechanisms: precomputing interaction context, composable sandboxed wisdom programs, and structured interaction content generation. The system has been formally proven to achieve stability, correctness, and dominance over reactive chatbots in expected turns-to-terminal-state.
